plugins.name: brand-guidelines
plugins.description: TechTown brand and design system guidelines. Use when creating UI components, styling pages, Astro/Vue components, Slidev theming, or implementing visual design for TechTown projects.

plugins.name: firebase-deploy
plugins.description: Setup Firebase Hosting with WIF-based GitHub Actions CI/CD for TechTown projects. Use when deploying a web app to Firebase, setting up hosting CI/CD, or configuring GitHub Actions with Workload Identity Federation.
